scene1_hook: Google drops FORTY BILLION on Anthropic! Tim Cook steps down, Ternus takes the throne, and Musk vs Altman finally hits the courtroom!
scene2_problem: Google is dumping up to FORTY BILLION dollars into Anthropic in cash and compute. Apple shocks the world — Tim Cook steps down, hardware boss John Ternus takes over. DeepSeek drops a V4 preview that Chinese labs say rivals Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI. And ComfyUI just hit a half-billion dollar valuation!
scene3_stakes: Musk vs Altman trial kicks off April 27th in Oakland — and it's going to get UGLY. Yann LeCun's AMI Labs raised a billion with just 12 employees, betting LLMs are a dead end. Meanwhile Meta keeps poaching from Thinking Machines Lab — but the talent war flows both ways. And Project Maven just helped the US military hit 1,000 targets in 24 hours over Iran.
scene4_solution: ComfyUI raised 30 million at a 500 million valuation — creators want CONTROL over generative media. NVIDIA and Google unveiled A5X instances on Vera Rubin NVL72 racks to crush inference costs. And Sony AI's table tennis robot is BEATING high-level human players!
scene5_ask: Next week — eyes on the Musk-Altman trial verdict and DeepSeek V4's full release. SusHi Tech Tokyo also lights up as the year's biggest tech destination. This has been your AI Weekly. Same time next Monday.
tagline: This has been your AI Weekly. Same time next Monday.
